recommendations.title: Churchill
recommendations.overview: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 24 hours before D-Day.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Haunted Holidays
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the gang participate in a toy store's holiday parade where they discover the abandoned haunted clock tower with a troubled past. A sinister snowman haunts the streets and accompanied with a large blizzard, threatens to close down the t

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: The Secret World of Arrietty
recommendations.overview: 14-year-old Arrietty and the rest of the Clock family live in peaceful anonymity as they make their own home from items "borrowed" from the house's human inhabitants. However, life changes for the Clocks when a human boy discovers Arrietty.

recommendations.title: Jack and the Cuckoo-Clock Heart
recommendations.overview: Jack is born with his heart frozen solid on the coldest day in history. A wise midwife saves him by replacing it with a cuckoo clock. Now Jack must abide by three rules to keep his mechanical heart safe: never touch the clock's hands, master his ange

recommendations.title: Jingle Bell Heist
recommendations.overview: Two down-on-their-luck hourly workers team up to rob a posh London department store on Christmas Eve. Will they steal each other's hearts along the way?

recommendations.title: Alma
recommendations.overview: Amidst the chilly white winter, bright-eyed Alma, wanders through Barcelona’s cobblestone streets. Suddenly, she spots an unassuming toy shop. Her gaze is drawn to a nearly identical figure staring back at her from the storefront window. As if by mag

recommendations.title: The Barbie Diaries
recommendations.overview: Barbie is disheartened when Todd breaks her heart and goes back to his former girlfriend. But things change when she comes across a diary, which makes her wishes come true.

recommendations.title: Poor Pierrot
recommendations.overview: One night, Arlequin comes to see his lover Colombine. But then Pierrot knocks at the door and Colombine and Arlequin hide. Pierrot starts singing but Arlequin scares him and the poor man goes away.

recommendations.title: Clock
recommendations.overview: On the eve of her 38th birthday, a woman desperately attempts to fix her broken biological clock.
